HashMap.noroutingruleconfigerrmssg: Not valid short code. Please dial valid short code.
HashMap.serveroverloadedmsg: Server is overloaded. Please try later
HashMap.servererrmssg: Server error, please try again after sometime
HashMap.dialogtimeouterrmssg: Request timeout please try again after sometime.
HashMap.asyncwaitusermessage: He thong dang ban, se update lai cho ban ngay
HashMap.asynchardfailmessage: He thong dang co nhieu nguoi su dung, vui long dung lai sau
